About us

Complete solar energy solutions, done right.

At ARKA Enterprises, we provide complete solar energy solutions for homes, businesses, farms, and industries across the Alibag–Raigad region. Our mission is simple: help you save electricity costs and move towards clean, reliable, and sustainable energy.

  • On-grid, off-grid and hybrid solar systems
  • Trusted brands — panels, inverters, structures and accessories
  • Government subsidy guidance and full documentation support
  • Site survey, installation and after-sales service under one roof
Our services

Three systems. One goal — lower bills.

Every roof and every load is different. We size and design the right system for your requirement and budget.

☀️ Grid-connected

On-Grid Solar System

Connected directly to the electricity grid — the most popular choice for homes and businesses.

  • Reduce electricity bills
  • Net metering facility
  • Low maintenance
  • Best for homes & commercial use
🔋 Battery-based

Off-Grid Solar System

Works with batteries and needs no grid connection — full energy independence.

  • Power backup during electricity cuts
  • Ideal for rural & remote areas
  • Complete energy independence
⚡ Best of both

Hybrid Solar System

Combines solar panels, batteries and the grid for uninterrupted, smart power.

  • Continuous power supply
  • Backup during load shedding
  • Maximum energy savings
  • Smart energy management

Government subsidy

The government pays a big part of your system.

Under PM Surya Ghar: Muft Bijli Yojana, residential rooftop solar gets direct Central Financial Assistance. We handle the application, documentation and net-metering approval for you.

Residential rooftop

Central Financial Assistance (CFA) — per household
1 kW system₹30,000
2 kW system₹60,000
3 kW & above₹78,000
Documents: electricity bill · Aadhaar · PAN · bank details · roof ownership proof. Subject to scheme terms & DISCOM net-metering approval.

Housing societies (RWA / CHS)

Rooftop solar for common facilities — lifts, water pumps, common lighting, clubhouse and CCTV — cuts common-area bills by 50–90%. Societies get ₹18,000 per kW subsidy under PM Surya Ghar.

Society registrationElectricity billSociety PANResolution copyNet metering
Check my eligibility on WhatsApp

Trusted brands. Complete material.

We supply and install premium inverter kits and every major panel technology, along with the full balance-of-system material for a safe, long-lasting plant.

Solar panels

Panel brands
WaareeTata Power SolaroofPremier EnergiesVikram SolarRenewSysAdani SolarUTL SolarRayzon SolarLuminous Solar

Structure, safety & balance of system

GI Pipe & GI Purling

Galvanised iron main structure — strong, rust-resistant and stable in all weather.

Polycab Wires

High-purity copper, fire-resistant insulation, low power loss, long service life.

Earthing Rod, Pit Cover & Chemical Bag

Safe path for fault current with long-lasting, efficient earthing performance.

Lightning Arrester

Spike and base that safely direct high-voltage surges to the ground.

ACDB / DCDB Boxes

Overload, short-circuit and surge protection on both AC and DC sides.

Net & Generation Meters

Net metering for import/export billing plus generation monitoring.

Clamp, Spring Nut & Allen Bolt

High-strength fastening for a firm, stable panel mount.

MC4 Connectors

Waterproof, secure panel-to-cable connections in all weather.

Precision Pipe (Wiring Conduit)

Protects wiring from damage and moisture with neat, safe cable routing.

Installed. Generating. Saving.
